title: Heartbeat Begins
subtitle: A tiny rhythm starts
description: By week 6, one of the most significant milestones occurs — the embryo’s heart begins to beat. Rapid development continues, and essential organs start forming more clearly.
what_to_expect: The embryo’s heart may begin beating
Development of basic facial features starts
Early symptoms like fatigue, nausea, or breast tenderness may appear
care_tips: Eat small, frequent meals to manage nausea
Get adequate rest and avoid overexertion

medical_checkups.note: This stage often includes early confirmation of development through medical evaluation.

commonly_suggested.name: Ultrasound Scan
commonly_suggested.purpose: Helps confirm pregnancy location and detect heartbeat

commonly_suggested.name: Blood Tests
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors hormone levels and overall health

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor will guide you on the timing and necessity of scans based on your condition.

important_note: The beginning of the heartbeat marks an important step in early development.
reassurance: A tiny heartbeat is a powerful sign that your journey is progressing.
medical_disclaimer: Always follow your healthcare provider’s advice regarding tests and symptoms.

diabetes.personalized_description: Stable blood sugar levels are especially important as organ development accelerates.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar may be closely monitored during early scans and tests.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support increased blood production and early growth.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be reviewed during blood tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this stage.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure may be monitored during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm routine supports your overall balance.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing organ and brain development.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be checked during early pregnancy evaluations.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As development progresses rapidly, managing multiple conditions requires close attention and consistency.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care and awareness can support a healthy journey forward.
